name: page-shell
title: Fuse PageShell
description: Fuse flow-state shell with Hard Rule 14 outer wrapper (flex flex-col gap-6 px-6 py-6) + Hard Rule 6 breadcrumb-with-rightSlot row. Built on shadcn Breadcrumb + Button. rightSlot carries Sort-only at V1.5 (Display + Filter activate at V1.6 via Twenty view-subsystem port per D16). Bulk-action affordances do NOT belong in rightSlot — they go in a floating bottom bar. Closes D34 CO-07 + DS-08 combined extraction.
